7	#
8	# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
9	#
10	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
11	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
12	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
13	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
14	# limitations under the License.
15	"""
16	onnxscript translations for dynamo ONNX export.
17	
18	Maps ``torch.ops.trt.*`` and ``torch.ops.trt_edgellm.*`` stubs to ONNX graphs.
19	Implementation files must be importable; ``onnxscript.script`` parses their AST.
20	
21	Attention plugin
22	----------------
23	A single ``_attention_plugin_translation`` covers all feature combinations
24	(vanilla, FP8-KV, tree attention, FP8-KV + tree attention).  Its signature
25	matches the full ``trt::attention_plugin`` custom-op schema so positional
26	alignment with the FX graph (where ``torch.export`` normalizes every kwarg
27	into a positional arg) is always correct.  ``attention_mask`` /
28	``attention_pos_id`` are optional ONNX inputs (empty when tree attention is
29	off); ``qkv_scales`` defaults to ``[1.0, 1.0, 1.0]`` in the op schema so it
30	is always a valid FLOATS attribute.
31	"""
32	
33	from typing import Sequence
34	
35	import onnx
36	import onnxscript
37	import torch
38	from onnxscript import opset21 as _op21
39	from onnxscript import script
40	
41	# Custom ONNX domains
42	_trt = onnxscript.values.Opset("trt", 1)
43	_trt_edgellm = onnxscript.values.Opset("trt_edgellm", 1)
44	
45	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
46	# Attention plugin translation (unified — all feature combinations)
47	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
48	
49	
50	@script()
51	def _attention_plugin_translation(
52	    query_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
53	    key_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
54	    value_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
55	    past_key_value: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
56	    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
57	    rope_rotary_cos_sin: onnxscript.FLOAT,
58	    kvcache_start_index: onnxscript.INT32,
59	    num_q_heads: int,
60	    num_kv_heads: int,
61	    head_size: int,
62	    sliding_window_size: int,
63	    enable_tree_attention: int,
64	    enable_fp8_kv_cache: int,
65	    attention_scale: float,
66	    enable_vision_block_attention: int,
67	    attention_mask: onnxscript.INT32,
68	    attention_pos_id: onnxscript.INT32,
69	    qkv_scales: Sequence[float],
70	) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16]:
71	    """Unified attention plugin covering vanilla, FP8-KV, tree, and tree+FP8-KV.
72	
73	    The signature matches the full ``trt::attention_plugin`` custom-op schema
74	    so torch.export's positional-arg normalisation is always aligned.
75	    ``attention_mask`` / ``attention_pos_id`` are optional ONNX inputs (empty
76	    when tree attention is off).  ``qkv_scales`` defaults to [1, 1, 1] in the
77	    op schema and is always a valid FLOATS attribute.
78	    """
79	    attn_4d, present_kv = _trt_edgellm.AttentionPlugin(
80	        query_states,
81	        key_states,
82	        value_states,
83	        past_key_value,
84	        context_lengths,
85	        rope_rotary_cos_sin,
86	        kvcache_start_index,
87	        attention_mask,
88	        attention_pos_id,
89	        num_q_heads=num_q_heads,
90	        num_kv_heads=num_kv_heads,
91	        head_size=head_size,
92	        enable_tree_attention=enable_tree_attention,
93	        enable_fp8_kv_cache=enable_fp8_kv_cache,
94	        enable_vision_block_attention=enable_vision_block_attention,
95	        sliding_window_size=sliding_window_size,
96	        qkv_scales=qkv_scales,
97	        attention_scale=attention_scale,
98	        _outputs=2,
99	    )
100	    return attn_4d, present_kv
101	
102	
103	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
104	# FP8 ops
105	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
106	
107	
108	@script()
109	def _fp8_quantize_translation(
110	    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
111	    scale: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
112	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT8E4M3FN:
113	    """Standard ONNX QuantizeLinear (see onnx.ai QuantizeLinear)."""
114	    return _op21.QuantizeLinear(
115	        hidden_states,
116	        scale,
117	        output_dtype=int(onnx.TensorProto.FLOAT8E4M3FN),
118	    )
119	
120	
121	@script()
122	def _fp8_dequantize_translation(
123	    x: onnxscript.FLOAT8E4M3FN,
124	    scale: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
125	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
126	    """Standard ONNX DequantizeLinear; FP16 scale -> FP16 dequantized output."""
127	    return _op21.DequantizeLinear(x, scale)
128	
129	
130	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
131	# NVFP4 ops
132	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
133	
134	
135	@script()
136	def _nvfp4_act_qdq_translation(
137	    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
138	    global_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
139	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
140	    """DynQ + 2x trt::DQ for NVFP4 activation quantization.
141	
142	    Emits the same graph as ModelOpt's ``export_fp4(dynamic)``::
143	
144	        TRT_FP4DynamicQuantize(x, scale, axis=-1, block_size=16, scale_type=17)
145	            -> (x_f4, sx_f8)
146	        trt::DequantizeLinear(sx_f8, scale)
147	            -> dq_scale
148	        trt::DequantizeLinear(x_f4, dq_scale, axis=-1, block_size=16)
149	            -> x_dq
150	    """
151	    x_f4, sx_f8 = _trt.TRT_FP4DynamicQuantize(
152	        hidden_states,
153	        global_scale,
154	        axis=-1,
155	        block_size=16,
156	        scale_type=17,
157	        _outputs=2,
158	    )
159	    # Cast fp32 global_scale -> fp16 so DQ outputs are fp16 (not fp32)
160	    global_scale_f16 = _op21.Cast(global_scale, to=10)  # 10 = FLOAT16
161	    dq_scale = _trt.DequantizeLinear(sx_f8, global_scale_f16)
162	    x_dq = _trt.DequantizeLinear(x_f4, dq_scale, axis=-1, block_size=16)
163	    return x_dq
164	
165	
166	@script()
167	def _nvfp4_dequantize_translation(
168	    weight: onnxscript.INT8,
169	    weight_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT8E4M3FN,
170	    weight_scale_2: onnxscript.FLOAT,
171	    group_size: int,
172	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
173	    """2xstandard-ONNX DequantizeLinear for NVFP4 weight dequantization.
174	
175	    Emits the same graph as ModelOpt's ``fp4qdq_to_2dq()``::
176	
177	        DequantizeLinear(weight_scale_fp8, weight_scale_2_fp32) -> ws
178	        DequantizeLinear(weight_fp4, ws, axis=-1, block_size=group_size) -> w_dq
179	    """
180	    # DQ1 (standard ONNX): fp8 per-block scales -> float32 scales
181	    ws = _op21.DequantizeLinear(weight_scale, weight_scale_2)
182	    # DQ2 (standard ONNX): FLOAT4E2M1 weight -> float32 (scale type propagates)
183	    # Note: weight initializer is rewritten from INT8 to FLOAT4E2M1 post-export.
184	    w_dq = _op21.DequantizeLinear(weight, ws, axis=-1, block_size=group_size)
185	    # Cast float32 -> float16 to match activation dtype for MatMul
186	    return _op21.Cast(w_dq, to=10)  # 10 = ONNX TensorProto.FLOAT16
187	
188	
189	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
190	# MXFP8 ops
191	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
192	
193	
194	@script()
195	def _mxfp8_act_qdq_translation(
196	    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16, ) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
197	    """MXFP8 activation: DynQ + DQ.
198	
199	    Emits::
200	
201	        TRT_MXFP8DynamicQuantize(x, axis=-1, block_size=32, output_dtype=17)
202	            -> (x_f8, sx_e8m0)
203	        TRT_MXFP8DequantizeLinear(x_f8, sx_e8m0,
204	            axis=-1, block_size=32, output_dtype=10)
205	            -> x_dq [float16]
206	    """
207	    x_f8, sx_e8m0 = _trt.TRT_MXFP8DynamicQuantize(
208	        hidden_states,
209	        axis=-1,
210	        block_size=32,
211	        output_dtype=17,  # FLOAT8E4M3FN
212	        _outputs=2,
213	    )
214	    x_dq = _trt.TRT_MXFP8DequantizeLinear(
215	        x_f8,
216	        sx_e8m0,
217	        axis=-1,
218	        block_size=32,
219	        output_dtype=10,  # FLOAT16
220	    )
221	    return x_dq
222	
223	
224	@script()
225	def _mxfp8_weight_dq_translation(
226	    weight: onnxscript.FLOAT8E4M3FN,
227	    weight_scale: onnxscript.UINT8,
228	    block_size: int,
229	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
230	    """MXFP8 weight dequantize: TRT_MXFP8DequantizeLinear.
231	
232	    Emits::
233	
234	        TRT_MXFP8DequantizeLinear(weight, weight_scale,
235	            axis=-1, block_size=block_size, output_dtype=10) -> w_dq [float16]
236	    """
237	    w_dq = _trt.TRT_MXFP8DequantizeLinear(
238	        weight,
239	        weight_scale,
240	        axis=-1,
241	        block_size=block_size,
242	        output_dtype=10,  # FLOAT16
243	    )
244	    return w_dq
245	
246	
247	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
248	# AWQ / INT4 op
249	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
250	
251	
252	@script()
253	def _int4_groupwise_gemm_translation(
254	    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
255	    qweight: onnxscript.INT8,
256	    scales: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
257	    gemm_n: int,
258	    gemm_k: int,
259	    group_size: int,
260	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
261	    return _trt_edgellm.Int4GroupwiseGemmPlugin(
262	        hidden_states,
263	        qweight,
264	        scales,
265	        gemm_n=gemm_n,
266	        gemm_k=gemm_k,
267	        group_size=group_size,
268	    )
269	
270	
271	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
272	# INT8 SmoothQuant ops
273	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
274	
275	
276	@script()
277	def _int8_sq_act_qdq_translation(
278	    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
279	    scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
280	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
281	    """Per-tensor INT8 activation QDQ: QuantizeLinear + DequantizeLinear.
282	
283	    Emits the standard ONNX QDQ pattern TRT recognises for INT8 GEMM fusion::
284	
285	        QuantizeLinear(x, scale, output_dtype=INT8) -> q
286	        DequantizeLinear(q, scale)                  -> dq  [float32]
287	        Cast(dq, to=FLOAT16)                        -> output
288	    """
289	    # output_dtype=3 -> INT8 (symmetric, zero_point=0)
290	    quantized = _op21.QuantizeLinear(hidden_states, scale, output_dtype=3)
291	    dq = _op21.DequantizeLinear(quantized, scale)
292	    return _op21.Cast(dq, to=10)  # 10 = FLOAT16
293	
294	
295	@script()
296	def _int8_sq_weight_dq_translation(
297	    weight: onnxscript.INT8,
298	    scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
299	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
300	    """Per-channel INT8 weight DequantizeLinear (axis=0).
301	
302	    Emits::
303	
304	        DequantizeLinear(weight, scale, axis=0) -> dq  [float32]
305	        Cast(dq, to=FLOAT16)                    -> output
306	    """
307	    dq = _op21.DequantizeLinear(weight, scale, axis=0)
308	    return _op21.Cast(dq, to=10)  # 10 = FLOAT16
309	
310	
311	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
312	# Hybrid (Mamba) ops
313	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
314	
315	
316	@script()
317	def _causal_conv1d_translation(
318	    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
319	    weight: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
320	    bias: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
321	    conv_state: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
322	    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
323	    stride: int,
324	    padding: int,
325	    dilation: int,
326	    groups: int,
327	) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16]:
328	    output, conv_state_out = _trt_edgellm.causal_conv1d(
329	        hidden_states,
330	        weight,
331	        bias,
332	        conv_state,
333	        context_lengths,
334	        stride=stride,
335	        padding=padding,
336	        dilation=dilation,
337	        groups=groups,
338	        use_mtp=0,
339	        _outputs=2,
340	    )
341	    intermediate_conv_state_out = _op21.Identity(conv_state_out)
342	    return output, conv_state_out, intermediate_conv_state_out
343	
344	
345	@script()
346	def _causal_conv1d_with_intermediate_translation(
347	    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
348	    weight: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
349	    bias: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
350	    conv_state: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
351	    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
352	    spec_verify_phase_marker: onnxscript.INT32,
353	    stride: int,
354	    padding: int,
355	    dilation: int,
356	    groups: int,
357	) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16]:
358	    output, conv_state_out, intermediate_conv_state_out = _trt_edgellm.causal_conv1d(
359	        hidden_states,
360	        weight,
361	        bias,
362	        conv_state,
363	        context_lengths,
364	        spec_verify_phase_marker,
365	        stride=stride,
366	        padding=padding,
367	        dilation=dilation,
368	        groups=groups,
369	        use_mtp=1,
370	        _outputs=3,
371	    )
372	    return output, conv_state_out, intermediate_conv_state_out
373	
374	
375	@script()
376	def _causal_conv1d_with_intermediate_tree_translation(
377	    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
378	    weight: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
379	    bias: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
380	    conv_state: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
381	    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
382	    spec_verify_phase_marker: onnxscript.INT32,
383	    tree_parent_ids: onnxscript.INT32,
384	    tree_depths: onnxscript.INT32,
385	    stride: int,
386	    padding: int,
387	    dilation: int,
388	    groups: int,
389	) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16]:
390	    output, conv_state_out, intermediate_conv_state_out = _trt_edgellm.causal_conv1d(
391	        hidden_states,
392	        weight,
393	        bias,
394	        conv_state,
395	        context_lengths,
396	        spec_verify_phase_marker,
397	        tree_parent_ids,
398	        tree_depths,
399	        stride=stride,
400	        padding=padding,
401	        dilation=dilation,
402	        groups=groups,
403	        use_ddtree=1,
404	        _outputs=3,
405	    )
406	    return output, conv_state_out, intermediate_conv_state_out
407	
408	
409	def _causal_conv1d_dispatch(
410	    hidden_states,
411	    weight,
412	    bias,
413	    conv_state,
414	    context_lengths,
415	    stride,
416	    padding,
417	    dilation,
418	    groups,
419	):
420	    return _causal_conv1d_translation(hidden_states, weight, bias, conv_state,
421	                                      context_lengths, stride, padding,
422	                                      dilation, groups)
423	
424	
425	def _causal_conv1d_intermediate_dispatch(
426	    hidden_states,
427	    weight,
428	    bias,
429	    conv_state,
430	    context_lengths,
431	    stride,
432	    padding,
433	    dilation,
434	    groups,
435	    spec_verify_phase_marker,
436	    tree_parent_ids=None,
437	    tree_depths=None,
438	    use_ddtree_state=False,
439	):
440	    if use_ddtree_state:
441	        if tree_parent_ids is None or tree_depths is None:
442	            raise ValueError(
443	                "causal_conv1d DDTree state path requires tree_parent_ids and tree_depths"
444	            )

641	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
642	# GatherND op  (token selection)
643	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
644	
645	
646	@script()
647	def _gather_nd_translation(
648	    value: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
649	    indices: onnxscript.INT64,
650	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
651	    """ONNX GatherND with batch_dims=1 for last-token selection.
652	
653	    Converts [B, S, H] hidden_states + [B, T] indices -> [B, T, H].
654	    indices is unsqueezed to [B, T, 1] as required by the GatherND spec.
655	
656	    GatherND (opset 16+), Unsqueeze (opset 13+), and Constant are all
657	    available at opset 21.
658	    """
659	    axes = _op21.Constant(value_ints=[-1])
660	    indices_3d = _op21.Unsqueeze(indices, axes)
661	    return _op21.GatherND(value, indices_3d, batch_dims=1)

698	@script()
699	def _trt_ragged_attention_inner(
700	    query_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
701	    key_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
702	    value_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
703	    mask: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
704	    query_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
705	    kv_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
706	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
707	    """Inner onnxscript function with all 6 positional inputs."""
708	    return _trt.TRT_Attention(
709	        query_states,
710	        key_states,
711	        value_states,
712	        mask,
713	        query_lengths,
714	        kv_lengths,

721	
722	def _trt_ragged_attention_translation(
723	    query_states,
724	    key_states,
725	    value_states,
726	    query_lengths,
727	    kv_lengths,
728	    num_heads,
729	    head_size,
730	    attention_scale,
731	    mask=None,
732	):
733	    """Ragged self-attention via TRT-native IAttention (packed NHD).
734	
735	    Non-identity attention scaling is folded into Q before TRT attention.
736	    query_lengths and kv_lengths must be separate graph tensors — TRT
737	    crashes when the same ONNX tensor is wired to both positions.
738	    """
739	    if attention_scale != 1.0:
740	        query_states = _op21.Mul(query_states, attention_scale)
741	    return _trt_ragged_attention_inner(
742	        query_states,
743	        key_states,
744	        value_states,
745	        mask,
746	        query_lengths,
747	        kv_lengths,
748	    )

958	@script()
959	def _fused_nvfp4_gemm_allreduce_translation(
960	    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
961	    global_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
962	    weight_f4: onnxscript.INT8,
963	    weight_f8_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT8E4M3FN,
964	    weight_f32_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
965	    tp_size: int,
966	) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
967	    """Emit the full row-parallel NVFP4 GEMM + AllReduce ONNX subgraph."""
968	    x_f4, sx_f8 = _trt.TRT_FP4DynamicQuantize(
969	        hidden_states,
970	        global_scale,
971	        axis=-1,
972	        block_size=16,
973	        scale_type=17,
974	        _outputs=2,
975	    )
976	    combined_scale = _trt.DequantizeLinear(sx_f8, global_scale)
977	    return _trt_edgellm.FusedNvfp4GemmAllReducePlugin(
978	        x_f4,
979	        combined_scale,
980	        weight_f4,
981	        weight_f8_scale,
982	        weight_f32_scale,
983	        tp_size=tp_size,
984	    )

1048	def build_custom_translation_table() -> dict:
1049	    """Return the ``custom_translation_table`` for ``torch.onnx.export(dynamo=True)``.
1050	
1051	    Maps each ``torch.ops.trt.*`` / ``torch.ops.trt_edgellm.*`` op to its
1052	    onnxscript translation function.
1053	    """
1054	    from .onnx_custom_schemas import \
1055	        register_tensorrt_edgellm_onnx_custom_schemas
1056	
1057	    register_tensorrt_edgellm_onnx_custom_schemas()
1058	
1059	    # Ensure custom ops are registered before accessing torch.ops.trt.*
1060	    from ..models import \
1061	        ops  # noqa: F401 - side-effect: registers all custom_ops
1062	
1063	    return {
1064	        torch.ops.trt.attention_plugin.default:
1065	        _attention_plugin_translation,
1066	        torch.ops.trt.fp8_quantize.default:
1067	        _fp8_quantize_translation,
1068	        torch.ops.trt.fp8_dequantize.default:
1069	        _fp8_dequantize_translation,
1070	        torch.ops.trt.nvfp4_act_qdq.default:
1071	        _nvfp4_act_qdq_translation,
1072	        torch.ops.trt.nvfp4_dequantize.default:
1073	        _nvfp4_dequantize_translation,
1074	        torch.ops.trt.mxfp8_act_qdq.default:
1075	        _mxfp8_act_qdq_translation,
1076	        torch.ops.trt.mxfp8_weight_dq.default:
1077	        _mxfp8_weight_dq_translation,

1079	        _int4_groupwise_gemm_translation,
1080	        torch.ops.trt.int8_sq_act_qdq.default:
1081	        _int8_sq_act_qdq_translation,

1083	        _int8_sq_weight_dq_translation,

1085	        _causal_conv1d_dispatch,

1087	        _causal_conv1d_intermediate_dispatch,

1089	        _update_ssm_state_translation,

1091	        _gated_delta_net_dispatch,

1101	        _int4_moe_plugin_translation,

# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2025-2026 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
"""
onnxscript translations for dynamo ONNX export.

Maps ``torch.ops.trt.*`` and ``torch.ops.trt_edgellm.*`` stubs to ONNX graphs.
Implementation files must be importable; ``onnxscript.script`` parses their AST.

Attention plugin
----------------
A single ``_attention_plugin_translation`` covers all feature combinations
(vanilla, FP8-KV, tree attention, FP8-KV + tree attention).  Its signature
matches the full ``trt::attention_plugin`` custom-op schema so positional
alignment with the FX graph (where ``torch.export`` normalizes every kwarg
into a positional arg) is always correct.  ``attention_mask`` /
``attention_pos_id`` are optional ONNX inputs (empty when tree attention is
off); ``qkv_scales`` defaults to ``[1.0, 1.0, 1.0]`` in the op schema so it
is always a valid FLOATS attribute.
"""

from typing import Sequence

import onnx
import onnxscript
import torch
from onnxscript import opset21 as _op21
from onnxscript import script

# Custom ONNX domains
_trt = onnxscript.values.Opset("trt", 1)
_trt_edgellm = onnxscript.values.Opset("trt_edgellm", 1)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Attention plugin translation (unified — all feature combinations)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _attention_plugin_translation(
    query_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    key_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    value_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    past_key_value: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
    rope_rotary_cos_sin: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    kvcache_start_index: onnxscript.INT32,
    num_q_heads: int,
    num_kv_heads: int,
    head_size: int,
    sliding_window_size: int,
    enable_tree_attention: int,
    enable_fp8_kv_cache: int,
    attention_scale: float,
    enable_vision_block_attention: int,
    attention_mask: onnxscript.INT32,
    attention_pos_id: onnxscript.INT32,
    qkv_scales: Sequence[float],
) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16]:
    """Unified attention plugin covering vanilla, FP8-KV, tree, and tree+FP8-KV.

    The signature matches the full ``trt::attention_plugin`` custom-op schema
    so torch.export's positional-arg normalisation is always aligned.
    ``attention_mask`` / ``attention_pos_id`` are optional ONNX inputs (empty
    when tree attention is off).  ``qkv_scales`` defaults to [1, 1, 1] in the
    op schema and is always a valid FLOATS attribute.
    """
    attn_4d, present_kv = _trt_edgellm.AttentionPlugin(
        query_states,
        key_states,
        value_states,
        past_key_value,
        context_lengths,
        rope_rotary_cos_sin,
        kvcache_start_index,
        attention_mask,
        attention_pos_id,
        num_q_heads=num_q_heads,
        num_kv_heads=num_kv_heads,
        head_size=head_size,
        enable_tree_attention=enable_tree_attention,
        enable_fp8_kv_cache=enable_fp8_kv_cache,
        enable_vision_block_attention=enable_vision_block_attention,
        sliding_window_size=sliding_window_size,
        qkv_scales=qkv_scales,
        attention_scale=attention_scale,
        _outputs=2,
    )
    return attn_4d, present_kv


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# FP8 ops
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _fp8_quantize_translation(
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    scale: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT8E4M3FN:
    """Standard ONNX QuantizeLinear (see onnx.ai QuantizeLinear)."""
    return _op21.QuantizeLinear(
        hidden_states,
        scale,
        output_dtype=int(onnx.TensorProto.FLOAT8E4M3FN),
    )


@script()
def _fp8_dequantize_translation(
    x: onnxscript.FLOAT8E4M3FN,
    scale: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """Standard ONNX DequantizeLinear; FP16 scale -> FP16 dequantized output."""
    return _op21.DequantizeLinear(x, scale)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# NVFP4 ops
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _nvfp4_act_qdq_translation(
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    global_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """DynQ + 2x trt::DQ for NVFP4 activation quantization.

    Emits the same graph as ModelOpt's ``export_fp4(dynamic)``::

        TRT_FP4DynamicQuantize(x, scale, axis=-1, block_size=16, scale_type=17)
            -> (x_f4, sx_f8)
        trt::DequantizeLinear(sx_f8, scale)
            -> dq_scale
        trt::DequantizeLinear(x_f4, dq_scale, axis=-1, block_size=16)
            -> x_dq
    """
    x_f4, sx_f8 = _trt.TRT_FP4DynamicQuantize(
        hidden_states,
        global_scale,
        axis=-1,
        block_size=16,
        scale_type=17,
        _outputs=2,
    )
    # Cast fp32 global_scale -> fp16 so DQ outputs are fp16 (not fp32)
    global_scale_f16 = _op21.Cast(global_scale, to=10)  # 10 = FLOAT16
    dq_scale = _trt.DequantizeLinear(sx_f8, global_scale_f16)
    x_dq = _trt.DequantizeLinear(x_f4, dq_scale, axis=-1, block_size=16)
    return x_dq


@script()
def _nvfp4_dequantize_translation(
    weight: onnxscript.INT8,
    weight_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT8E4M3FN,
    weight_scale_2: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    group_size: int,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """2xstandard-ONNX DequantizeLinear for NVFP4 weight dequantization.

    Emits the same graph as ModelOpt's ``fp4qdq_to_2dq()``::

        DequantizeLinear(weight_scale_fp8, weight_scale_2_fp32) -> ws
        DequantizeLinear(weight_fp4, ws, axis=-1, block_size=group_size) -> w_dq
    """
    # DQ1 (standard ONNX): fp8 per-block scales -> float32 scales
    ws = _op21.DequantizeLinear(weight_scale, weight_scale_2)
    # DQ2 (standard ONNX): FLOAT4E2M1 weight -> float32 (scale type propagates)
    # Note: weight initializer is rewritten from INT8 to FLOAT4E2M1 post-export.
    w_dq = _op21.DequantizeLinear(weight, ws, axis=-1, block_size=group_size)
    # Cast float32 -> float16 to match activation dtype for MatMul
    return _op21.Cast(w_dq, to=10)  # 10 = ONNX TensorProto.FLOAT16


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# MXFP8 ops
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _mxfp8_act_qdq_translation(
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16, ) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """MXFP8 activation: DynQ + DQ.

    Emits::

        TRT_MXFP8DynamicQuantize(x, axis=-1, block_size=32, output_dtype=17)
            -> (x_f8, sx_e8m0)
        TRT_MXFP8DequantizeLinear(x_f8, sx_e8m0,
            axis=-1, block_size=32, output_dtype=10)
            -> x_dq [float16]
    """
    x_f8, sx_e8m0 = _trt.TRT_MXFP8DynamicQuantize(
        hidden_states,
        axis=-1,
        block_size=32,
        output_dtype=17,  # FLOAT8E4M3FN
        _outputs=2,
    )
    x_dq = _trt.TRT_MXFP8DequantizeLinear(
        x_f8,
        sx_e8m0,
        axis=-1,
        block_size=32,
        output_dtype=10,  # FLOAT16
    )
    return x_dq


@script()
def _mxfp8_weight_dq_translation(
    weight: onnxscript.FLOAT8E4M3FN,
    weight_scale: onnxscript.UINT8,
    block_size: int,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """MXFP8 weight dequantize: TRT_MXFP8DequantizeLinear.

    Emits::

        TRT_MXFP8DequantizeLinear(weight, weight_scale,
            axis=-1, block_size=block_size, output_dtype=10) -> w_dq [float16]
    """
    w_dq = _trt.TRT_MXFP8DequantizeLinear(
        weight,
        weight_scale,
        axis=-1,
        block_size=block_size,
        output_dtype=10,  # FLOAT16
    )
    return w_dq


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# AWQ / INT4 op
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _int4_groupwise_gemm_translation(
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    qweight: onnxscript.INT8,
    scales: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    gemm_n: int,
    gemm_k: int,
    group_size: int,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    return _trt_edgellm.Int4GroupwiseGemmPlugin(
        hidden_states,
        qweight,
        scales,
        gemm_n=gemm_n,
        gemm_k=gemm_k,
        group_size=group_size,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# INT8 SmoothQuant ops
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _int8_sq_act_qdq_translation(
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """Per-tensor INT8 activation QDQ: QuantizeLinear + DequantizeLinear.

    Emits the standard ONNX QDQ pattern TRT recognises for INT8 GEMM fusion::

        QuantizeLinear(x, scale, output_dtype=INT8) -> q
        DequantizeLinear(q, scale)                  -> dq  [float32]
        Cast(dq, to=FLOAT16)                        -> output
    """
    # output_dtype=3 -> INT8 (symmetric, zero_point=0)
    quantized = _op21.QuantizeLinear(hidden_states, scale, output_dtype=3)
    dq = _op21.DequantizeLinear(quantized, scale)
    return _op21.Cast(dq, to=10)  # 10 = FLOAT16


@script()
def _int8_sq_weight_dq_translation(
    weight: onnxscript.INT8,
    scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """Per-channel INT8 weight DequantizeLinear (axis=0).

    Emits::

        DequantizeLinear(weight, scale, axis=0) -> dq  [float32]
        Cast(dq, to=FLOAT16)                    -> output
    """
    dq = _op21.DequantizeLinear(weight, scale, axis=0)
    return _op21.Cast(dq, to=10)  # 10 = FLOAT16


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Hybrid (Mamba) ops
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _causal_conv1d_translation(
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    weight: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    bias: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    conv_state: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
    stride: int,
    padding: int,
    dilation: int,
    groups: int,
) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16]:
    output, conv_state_out = _trt_edgellm.causal_conv1d(
        hidden_states,
        weight,
        bias,
        conv_state,
        context_lengths,
        stride=stride,
        padding=padding,
        dilation=dilation,
        groups=groups,
        use_mtp=0,
        _outputs=2,
    )
    intermediate_conv_state_out = _op21.Identity(conv_state_out)
    return output, conv_state_out, intermediate_conv_state_out


@script()
def _causal_conv1d_with_intermediate_translation(
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    weight: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    bias: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    conv_state: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
    spec_verify_phase_marker: onnxscript.INT32,
    stride: int,
    padding: int,
    dilation: int,
    groups: int,
) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16]:
    output, conv_state_out, intermediate_conv_state_out = _trt_edgellm.causal_conv1d(
        hidden_states,
        weight,
        bias,
        conv_state,
        context_lengths,
        spec_verify_phase_marker,
        stride=stride,
        padding=padding,
        dilation=dilation,
        groups=groups,
        use_mtp=1,
        _outputs=3,
    )
    return output, conv_state_out, intermediate_conv_state_out


@script()
def _causal_conv1d_with_intermediate_tree_translation(
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    weight: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    bias: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    conv_state: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
    spec_verify_phase_marker: onnxscript.INT32,
    tree_parent_ids: onnxscript.INT32,
    tree_depths: onnxscript.INT32,
    stride: int,
    padding: int,
    dilation: int,
    groups: int,
) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16]:
    output, conv_state_out, intermediate_conv_state_out = _trt_edgellm.causal_conv1d(
        hidden_states,
        weight,
        bias,
        conv_state,
        context_lengths,
        spec_verify_phase_marker,
        tree_parent_ids,
        tree_depths,
        stride=stride,
        padding=padding,
        dilation=dilation,
        groups=groups,
        use_ddtree=1,
        _outputs=3,
    )
    return output, conv_state_out, intermediate_conv_state_out


def _causal_conv1d_dispatch(
    hidden_states,
    weight,
    bias,
    conv_state,
    context_lengths,
    stride,
    padding,
    dilation,
    groups,
):
    return _causal_conv1d_translation(hidden_states, weight, bias, conv_state,
                                      context_lengths, stride, padding,
                                      dilation, groups)


def _causal_conv1d_intermediate_dispatch(
    hidden_states,
    weight,
    bias,
    conv_state,
    context_lengths,
    stride,
    padding,
    dilation,
    groups,
    spec_verify_phase_marker,
    tree_parent_ids=None,
    tree_depths=None,
    use_ddtree_state=False,
):
    if use_ddtree_state:
        if tree_parent_ids is None or tree_depths is None:
            raise ValueError(
                "causal_conv1d DDTree state path requires tree_parent_ids and tree_depths"
            )
        return _causal_conv1d_with_intermediate_tree_translation(
            hidden_states, weight, bias, conv_state, context_lengths,
            spec_verify_phase_marker, tree_parent_ids, tree_depths, stride,
            padding, dilation, groups)
    return _causal_conv1d_with_intermediate_translation(
        hidden_states, weight, bias, conv_state, context_lengths,
        spec_verify_phase_marker, stride, padding, dilation, groups)


@script()
def _gated_delta_net_translation(
    q: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    k: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    v: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    a: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    b: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    A_log: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    dt_bias: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    h0_source: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
    k_dim: int,
    v_dim: int,
) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT, onnxscript.FLOAT]:
    output, h0_out = _trt_edgellm.gated_delta_net(
        q,
        k,
        v,
        a,
        b,
        A_log,
        dt_bias,
        h0_source,
        context_lengths,
        k_dim=k_dim,
        v_dim=v_dim,
        use_mtp=0,
        _outputs=2,
    )
    intermediate_h0_out = _op21.Identity(h0_out)
    return output, h0_out, intermediate_h0_out


@script()
def _gated_delta_net_with_intermediate_translation(
    q: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    k: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    v: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    a: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    b: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    A_log: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    dt_bias: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    h0_source: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
    spec_verify_phase_marker: onnxscript.INT32,
    k_dim: int,
    v_dim: int,
) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT, onnxscript.FLOAT]:
    output, h0_out, intermediate_h0_out = _trt_edgellm.gated_delta_net(
        q,
        k,
        v,
        a,
        b,
        A_log,
        dt_bias,
        h0_source,
        context_lengths,
        spec_verify_phase_marker,
        k_dim=k_dim,
        v_dim=v_dim,
        use_mtp=1,
        _outputs=3,
    )
    return output, h0_out, intermediate_h0_out


@script()
def _gated_delta_net_with_intermediate_tree_translation(
    q: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    k: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    v: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    a: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    b: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    A_log: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    dt_bias: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    h0_source: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
    spec_verify_phase_marker: onnxscript.INT32,
    tree_parent_ids: onnxscript.INT32,
    tree_depths: onnxscript.INT32,
    k_dim: int,
    v_dim: int,
) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT, onnxscript.FLOAT]:
    output, h0_out, intermediate_h0_out = _trt_edgellm.gated_delta_net(
        q,
        k,
        v,
        a,
        b,
        A_log,
        dt_bias,
        h0_source,
        context_lengths,
        spec_verify_phase_marker,
        tree_parent_ids,
        tree_depths,
        k_dim=k_dim,
        v_dim=v_dim,
        use_ddtree=1,
        _outputs=3,
    )
    return output, h0_out, intermediate_h0_out


def _gated_delta_net_dispatch(
    q,
    k,
    v,
    a,
    b,
    A_log,
    dt_bias,
    h0_source,
    context_lengths,
    k_dim,
    v_dim,
):
    return _gated_delta_net_translation(q, k, v, a, b, A_log, dt_bias,
                                        h0_source, context_lengths, k_dim,
                                        v_dim)


def _gated_delta_net_intermediate_dispatch(
    q,
    k,
    v,
    a,
    b,
    A_log,
    dt_bias,
    h0_source,
    context_lengths,
    k_dim,
    v_dim,
    spec_verify_phase_marker,
    tree_parent_ids=None,
    tree_depths=None,
    use_ddtree_state=False,
):
    if use_ddtree_state:
        if tree_parent_ids is None or tree_depths is None:
            raise ValueError(
                "gated_delta_net DDTree state path requires tree_parent_ids and tree_depths"
            )
        return _gated_delta_net_with_intermediate_tree_translation(
            q, k, v, a, b, A_log, dt_bias, h0_source, context_lengths,
            spec_verify_phase_marker, tree_parent_ids, tree_depths, k_dim,
            v_dim)
    return _gated_delta_net_with_intermediate_translation(
        q, k, v, a, b, A_log, dt_bias, h0_source, context_lengths,
        spec_verify_phase_marker, k_dim, v_dim)


@script()
def _update_ssm_state_translation(
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    ssm_a: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    ssm_b: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    ssm_c: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    ssm_d: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    dt: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    dt_bias: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    state: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    context_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
    dt_softplus: int,
    ngroups: int,
    chunk_size: int = 0,
) -> tuple[onnxscript.FLOAT16, onnxscript.FLOAT16]:
    output, state_out = _trt_edgellm.update_ssm_state(
        hidden_states,
        ssm_a,
        ssm_b,
        ssm_c,
        ssm_d,
        dt,
        dt_bias,
        state,
        context_lengths,
        dt_softplus=dt_softplus,
        ngroups=ngroups,
        chunk_size=chunk_size,
        _outputs=2,
    )
    return output, state_out


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# GatherND op  (token selection)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _gather_nd_translation(
    value: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    indices: onnxscript.INT64,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """ONNX GatherND with batch_dims=1 for last-token selection.

    Converts [B, S, H] hidden_states + [B, T] indices -> [B, T, H].
    indices is unsqueezed to [B, T, 1] as required by the GatherND spec.

    GatherND (opset 16+), Unsqueeze (opset 13+), and Constant are all
    available at opset 21.
    """
    axes = _op21.Constant(value_ints=[-1])
    indices_3d = _op21.Unsqueeze(indices, axes)
    return _op21.GatherND(value, indices_3d, batch_dims=1)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ViT attention op
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _vit_attention_plugin_translation(
    query_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    key_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    value_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    cu_seqlens: onnxscript.INT32,
    max_seqlen_carrier: onnxscript.INT32,
    num_heads: int,
    head_size: int,
    attention_scale: float,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """ViT ragged self-attention without KV cache."""
    return _trt_edgellm.ViTAttentionPlugin(
        query_states,
        key_states,
        value_states,
        cu_seqlens,
        max_seqlen_carrier,
        num_heads=num_heads,
        head_size=head_size,
        attention_scale=attention_scale,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# TRT-native ViT attention (TRT >= 11, packed NHD with Q scaling)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _trt_ragged_attention_inner(
    query_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    key_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    value_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    mask: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    query_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
    kv_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """Inner onnxscript function with all 6 positional inputs."""
    return _trt.TRT_Attention(
        query_states,
        key_states,
        value_states,
        mask,
        query_lengths,
        kv_lengths,
        query_form="packed_nhd",
        kv_form="packed_nhd",
        causal_kind="none",
        TRT_decomposable=0,
    )


def _trt_ragged_attention_translation(
    query_states,
    key_states,
    value_states,
    query_lengths,
    kv_lengths,
    num_heads,
    head_size,
    attention_scale,
    mask=None,
):
    """Ragged self-attention via TRT-native IAttention (packed NHD).

    Non-identity attention scaling is folded into Q before TRT attention.
    query_lengths and kv_lengths must be separate graph tensors — TRT
    crashes when the same ONNX tensor is wired to both positions.
    """
    if attention_scale != 1.0:
        query_states = _op21.Mul(query_states, attention_scale)
    return _trt_ragged_attention_inner(
        query_states,
        key_states,
        value_states,
        mask,
        query_lengths,
        kv_lengths,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# TRT native attention ops (RotaryEmbedding, TensorScatter, Attention)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _rope_onnx_translation(
    x: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    cos: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    sin: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    position_ids: onnxscript.INT32,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    return _trt.RotaryEmbedding(x, cos, sin, position_ids)


@script()
def _kv_cache_update_onnx_translation(
    cache: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    new_kv: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    cache_indices: onnxscript.INT32,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    return _trt.TensorScatter(cache, new_kv, cache_indices)


@script()
def _attention_onnx_translation(
    query: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    key: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    value: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    attn_mask: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    is_causal: int,
    scale: float,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    return _trt.Attention(
        query,
        key,
        value,
        attn_mask,
        is_causal=is_causal,
        TRT_decomposable=1,
        scale=scale,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# INT4 MoE plugin
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _int4_moe_plugin_translation(
    router_logits: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    fc_gate_up_qweights: onnxscript.INT8,
    fc_gate_up_scales: onnxscript.FLOAT16,

    top_k: int,
    hidden_size: int,
    moe_inter_size: int,

) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    return _trt_edgellm.Int4MoePlugin(

        fc_gate_up_qweights,
        fc_gate_up_scales,
        fc_down_qweights,

        hidden_size=hidden_size,
        moe_inter_size=moe_inter_size,
        activation_type=activation_type,
        quantization_group_size=quantization_group_size,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Public API
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _nvfp4_moe_plugin_translation(
    router_logits: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,

    fc1_blocks_scale: onnxscript.INT8,

    return output


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# NvFP4MoEPluginGeforce (SM12x fused; same signature, different plugin layer)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _nvfp4_moe_plugin_geforce_translation(
    router_logits: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    fc1_qweights: onnxscript.INT8,
    fc1_blocks_scale: onnxscript.INT8,
    fc1_alpha: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    fc2_qweights: onnxscript.INT8,
    fc2_blocks_scale: onnxscript.INT8,
    fc2_alpha: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    input_global_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    down_input_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    e_score_correction_bias: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    num_experts: int,
    top_k: int,
    hidden_size: int,
    moe_inter_size: int,
    activation_type: int,
    n_group: int,
    topk_group: int,
    norm_topk_prob: int,
    routed_scaling_factor: float,
    routing_mode: int,
    backend: int,
    io_dtype: int,
    max_routed_rows: int,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    output = _trt_edgellm.NvFP4MoEPluginGeforce(
        router_logits,
        hidden_states,
        fc1_qweights,
        fc1_blocks_scale,
        fc1_alpha,

        fc2_alpha,

        num_experts=num_experts,
        top_k=top_k,
        hidden_size=hidden_size,
        moe_inter_size=moe_inter_size,
        activation_type=activation_type,
        n_group=n_group,
        topk_group=topk_group,
        norm_topk_prob=norm_topk_prob,
        routed_scaling_factor=routed_scaling_factor,
        routing_mode=routing_mode,
        backend=backend,
        io_dtype=io_dtype,
        max_routed_rows=max_routed_rows,
    )
    return output


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# FusedNvfp4GemmAllReducePlugin (row-parallel NVFP4 GEMM + AllReduce)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _fused_nvfp4_gemm_allreduce_translation(
    hidden_states: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    global_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    weight_f4: onnxscript.INT8,
    weight_f8_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT8E4M3FN,
    weight_f32_scale: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    tp_size: int,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """Emit the full row-parallel NVFP4 GEMM + AllReduce ONNX subgraph."""
    x_f4, sx_f8 = _trt.TRT_FP4DynamicQuantize(
        hidden_states,
        global_scale,
        axis=-1,
        block_size=16,
        scale_type=17,
        _outputs=2,
    )
    combined_scale = _trt.DequantizeLinear(sx_f8, global_scale)
    return _trt_edgellm.FusedNvfp4GemmAllReducePlugin(
        x_f4,
        combined_scale,
        weight_f4,
        weight_f8_scale,
        weight_f32_scale,
        tp_size=tp_size,
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# DFlash target KV cache update op
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _dflash_target_kv_cache_update_translation(
    k_delta: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    v_delta: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    past_key_value: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    rope_cos_sin: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    delta_start_positions: onnxscript.INT32,
    delta_lengths: onnxscript.INT32,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """DFlash target KV cache update: apply RoPE to k_delta, write k+v into cache."""
    present_kv = _trt_edgellm.DFlashTargetKVCacheUpdate(
        k_delta,
        v_delta,
        past_key_value,
        rope_cos_sin,
        delta_start_positions,
        delta_lengths,
    )
    return present_kv


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Gemma4 Audio Attention Plugin
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------


@script()
def _gemma4_audio_attention_plugin_translation(
    q_raw: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    k_raw: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    v: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    gamma: onnxscript.FLOAT,
    rel_key: onnxscript.FLOAT16,
    valid: onnxscript.BOOL,
    seq_len_carrier: onnxscript.INT32,
    chunk_size: int,
    left_horizon: int,
    context_size: int,
    logit_cap: float,
) -> onnxscript.FLOAT16:
    """Gemma4 audio chunked local attention plugin."""
    return _trt_edgellm.Gemma4AudioAttentionPlugin(
        q_raw,
        k_raw,
        v,
        gamma,
        rel_key,
        valid,
        seq_len_carrier,
        chunk_size=chunk_size,
        left_horizon=left_horizon,
        context_size=context_size,
        logit_cap=logit_cap,
    )


def build_custom_translation_table() -> dict:
    """Return the ``custom_translation_table`` for ``torch.onnx.export(dynamo=True)``.

    Maps each ``torch.ops.trt.*`` / ``torch.ops.trt_edgellm.*`` op to its
    onnxscript translation function.
    """
    from .onnx_custom_schemas import \
        register_tensorrt_edgellm_onnx_custom_schemas

    register_tensorrt_edgellm_onnx_custom_schemas()

    # Ensure custom ops are registered before accessing torch.ops.trt.*
    from ..models import \
        ops  # noqa: F401 - side-effect: registers all custom_ops

    return {
        torch.ops.trt.attention_plugin.default:
        _attention_plugin_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.fp8_quantize.default:
        _fp8_quantize_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.fp8_dequantize.default:
        _fp8_dequantize_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.nvfp4_act_qdq.default:
        _nvfp4_act_qdq_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.nvfp4_dequantize.default:
        _nvfp4_dequantize_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.mxfp8_act_qdq.default:
        _mxfp8_act_qdq_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.mxfp8_weight_dq.default:
        _mxfp8_weight_dq_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.int4_groupwise_gemm.default:
        _int4_groupwise_gemm_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.int8_sq_act_qdq.default:
        _int8_sq_act_qdq_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.int8_sq_weight_dq.default:
        _int8_sq_weight_dq_translation,
        torch.ops.trt_edgellm.causal_conv1d.default:
        _causal_conv1d_dispatch,
        torch.ops.trt_edgellm.causal_conv1d_with_intermediate.default:
        _causal_conv1d_intermediate_dispatch,
        torch.ops.trt_edgellm.update_ssm_state.default:
        _update_ssm_state_translation,
        torch.ops.trt_edgellm.gated_delta_net.default:
        _gated_delta_net_dispatch,
        torch.ops.trt_edgellm.gated_delta_net_with_intermediate.default:
        _gated_delta_net_intermediate_dispatch,
        torch.ops.trt.vit_attention_plugin.default:
        _vit_attention_plugin_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.trt_ragged_attention.default:
        _trt_ragged_attention_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.gather_nd.default:
        _gather_nd_translation,
        torch.ops.trt_edgellm.int4_moe_plugin.default:
        _int4_moe_plugin_translation,
        torch.ops.trt_edgellm.Nvfp4MoePlugin.default:
        _nvfp4_moe_plugin_translation,
        torch.ops.trt_edgellm.NvFP4MoEPluginGeforce.default:
        _nvfp4_moe_plugin_geforce_translation,
        torch.ops.trt_edgellm.dflash_target_kv_cache_update.default:
        _dflash_target_kv_cache_update_translation,
        # TRT native attention ops (used by Alpamayo)
        torch.ops.trt.rope_onnx.default:
        _rope_onnx_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.kv_cache_update_onnx.default:
        _kv_cache_update_onnx_translation,
        torch.ops.trt.attention_onnx.default:
        _attention_onnx_translation,
        torch.ops.trt_edgellm.fused_nvfp4_gemm_allreduce.default:
        _fused_nvfp4_gemm_allreduce_translation,

    }

15	"""
16	ONNX export for from-scratch visual and audio encoders.
17	
18	Replaces the former ``export_visual.py`` / ``export_audio.py`` pair with a
19	single unified module.  Both encoder types share the same dynamo export path;
20	the only difference is how the model is built and how its I/O spec is provided.
21	
22	Visual encoders — I/O spec via ``model.get_onnx_export_args(config, device)``:
23	    - Qwen3-VL         (model_type ``qwen3_vl``, ``qwen3_omni``)
24	    - Qwen3.5          (model_type ``qwen3_5``, ``qwen3_5_moe``)
25	    - Qwen2.5-VL       (model_type ``qwen2_5_vl``)
26	    - InternVL3        (model_type ``internvl_chat``)
27	    - InternVL3 HF     (model_type ``internvl``)
28	    - Phi-4 Multimodal (model_type ``phi4mm``, ``phi4_multimodal``)
29	    - Gemma4            (model_type ``gemma4``)
30	    - Gemma4 Unified    (model_type ``gemma4_unified``)
31	    - Nemotron-Omni    (model_type ``NemotronH_Nano_VL_V2`` or
32	      ``NemotronH_Nano_Omni_Reasoning_V3``)
33	
34	Audio encoders — I/O spec defined internally or via ``model.get_onnx_export_args``:
35	    - Qwen3-ASR    (model_type ``qwen3_asr``)
36	    - Qwen3-Omni   (model_type ``qwen3_omni``, ``qwen3_omni_thinker``)
37	    - Gemma4 Unified (model_type ``gemma4_unified``)
38	    - Nemotron-Omni (model_type ``NemotronH_Nano_VL_V2`` or
39	      ``NemotronH_Nano_Omni_Reasoning_V3``)
40	
41	Note: Qwen3-TTS has NO audio encoder.  Its Talker/CodePredictor are LLM
42	decoders exported via the standard LLM pipeline.
43	"""
44	
45	from __future__ import annotations
46	
47	import importlib
48	import logging
49	import os
50	from typing import TYPE_CHECKING
51	
52	import torch
53	import torch.nn as nn
54	
55	from .dynamo_translations import build_custom_translation_table
56	from .export import (_OPSET_VERSION, _fix_initializer_dtypes,
57	                     _fix_nvfp4_weight_dtype, _permissive_inline_opset,
58	                     _strip_onnxscript_internal_attrs)
59	
60	if TYPE_CHECKING:
61	    from ..config import ModelConfig
62	
63	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
64	
65	__all__ = [
66	    "export_visual_onnx",
67	    "export_audio_onnx",
68	    "export_action_onnx",
69	]
70	
71	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
72	# Visual encoder registry
73	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
74	
75	_NEMOTRON_OMNI_MODEL_TYPES: frozenset[str] = frozenset([
76	    "NemotronH_Nano_VL_V2",
77	    "NemotronH_Nano_Omni_Reasoning_V3",
78	])
79	
80	# Maps model_type → internal family name
81	_VISUAL_REGISTRY: dict[str, str] = {
82	    "qwen3_vl": "qwen3_vl",
83	    # Qwen3-Omni (dense and MoE) reuses Qwen3-VL's computation graph but
84	    # uses HF Qwen3-Omni parameter naming (``thinker.visual.merger.ln_q``,
85	    # ``mlp.0/2``, ``merger_list``).  Dispatch to a dedicated family that
86	    # translates ckpt keys before delegating to build_qwen3_vl_visual.
87	    "qwen3_omni": "qwen3_omni",
88	    "qwen3_omni_moe": "qwen3_omni",
89	    "qwen3_5": "qwen3_5",
90	    "qwen3_5_moe": "qwen3_5",
91	    "qwen2_5_vl": "qwen2_5_vl",
92	    "internvl_chat": "internvl3",
93	    "internvl": "internvl3_5",
94	    "phi4mm": "phi4mm",
95	    "phi4_multimodal": "phi4mm",
96	    "gemma4": "gemma4",
97	    "gemma4_unified": "gemma4_unified",
98	    "NemotronH_Nano_VL_V2": "nemotron_omni",
99	    "NemotronH_Nano_Omni_Reasoning_V3": "nemotron_omni",
100	}
101	
102	# Maps family → dotted module path inside tensorrt_edgellm
103	_VISUAL_FAMILY_MODULE: dict[str, str] = {
104	    "qwen3_vl":
105	    "tensorrt_edgellm.models.qwen3_vl.modeling_qwen3_vl_visual",
106	    "qwen3_omni":
107	    "tensorrt_edgellm.models.qwen3_omni.modeling_qwen3_omni_visual",
108	    "qwen3_5":
109	    "tensorrt_edgellm.models.qwen3_5.modeling_qwen3_5_visual",
110	    "qwen2_5_vl":
111	    "tensorrt_edgellm.models.qwen2_5_vl.modeling_qwen2_5_vl_visual",
112	    "internvl3":
113	    "tensorrt_edgellm.models.internvl3.modeling_internvl3_visual",
114	    "internvl3_5":
115	    "tensorrt_edgellm.models.internvl3_5.modeling_internvl3_5_visual",
116	    "phi4mm":
117	    "tensorrt_edgellm.models.phi4mm.modeling_phi4mm_visual",
118	    "gemma4":
119	    "tensorrt_edgellm.models.gemma4.modeling_gemma4_visual",
120	    "gemma4_unified":
121	    "tensorrt_edgellm.models.gemma4.modeling_gemma4_unified_visual",
122	    "nemotron_omni":
123	    "tensorrt_edgellm.models.nemotron_omni.modeling_nemotron_omni_visual",
124	}
125	
126	# Maps family → build function name in that module
127	_VISUAL_FAMILY_BUILD_FN: dict[str, str] = {
128	    "qwen3_vl": "build_qwen3_vl_visual",
129	    "qwen3_omni": "build_qwen3_omni_visual",
130	    "qwen3_5": "build_qwen3_5_visual",
131	    "qwen2_5_vl": "build_qwen25_vl_visual",
132	    "internvl3": "build_internvl_visual",
133	    "internvl3_5": "build_internvl3_5_visual",
134	    "phi4mm": "build_phi4mm_visual",
135	    "gemma4": "build_gemma4_visual",
136	    "gemma4_unified": "build_gemma4_unified_visual",
137	    "nemotron_omni": "build_nemotron_omni_visual",
138	}
139	
140	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
141	# Audio encoder registry
142	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
143	
144	_AUDIO_MODEL_TYPES: frozenset[str] = frozenset([
145	    "qwen3_asr",
146	    "qwen3_omni",
147	    "qwen3_omni_thinker",
148	    "qwen3_omni_moe",
149	    "qwen3_omni_moe_thinker",
150	    "gemma4",
151	    "gemma4_unified",
152	    *_NEMOTRON_OMNI_MODEL_TYPES,
153	    # qwen3_tts intentionally excluded: Qwen3-TTS has NO audio encoder.
154	])
155	
156	# Safetensors key prefix per audio model type.
157	# Qwen3-ASR checkpoints (including 0.6B) embed the audio tower under
158	# ``thinker.audio_tower.*``, matching the Qwen3-Omni layout.
159	_AUDIO_KEY_PREFIX: dict[str, str] = {
160	    "qwen3_asr": "thinker.audio_tower.",
161	    "qwen3_omni": "thinker.audio_tower.",
162	    "qwen3_omni_thinker": "thinker.audio_tower.",
163	    "qwen3_omni_moe": "thinker.audio_tower.",
164	    "qwen3_omni_moe_thinker": "thinker.audio_tower.",
165	    "gemma4": "model.audio_tower.",
166	}
167	
168	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
169	# Visual config extraction
170	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
171	
172	
173	def _get_visual_config(model_type: str, config: dict) -> dict:
174	    """Extract visual encoder sub-config from the full model config."""
175	    if model_type in ("qwen3_vl", "qwen3_omni", "qwen3_omni_moe", "qwen3_5",
176	                      "qwen3_5_moe", "qwen2_5_vl"):
177	        # Qwen3-Omni (dense + MoE) stores vision_config nested under
178	        # thinker_config; other Qwen VL variants keep it at the root.
179	        return (config.get("vision_config")
180	                or config.get("thinker_config", {}).get("vision_config")
181	                or config)
182	    if (model_type in ("internvl", "internvl_chat", "gemma4", "gemma4_unified")
183	            or model_type in _NEMOTRON_OMNI_MODEL_TYPES):
184	        # InternVL / Gemma4 / Nemotron-Omni need the full config
185	        # (vision + text + projection/runtime fields).
186	        return config
187	    if model_type in ("phi4mm", "phi4_multimodal"):
188	        # Phi-4mm visual config is hardcoded (not in config.json).
189	        # Values match vision_siglip_navit.py::get_siglip_vision_model().
190	        vcfg: dict = {
191	            "hidden_size": 1152,
192	            "image_size": 448,
193	            "intermediate_size": 4304,
194	            "num_attention_heads": 16,
195	            "num_hidden_layers": 27,
196	            "patch_size": 14,
197	            "feature_layer": -2,
198	        }
199	        vcfg["proj_hidden_size"] = config["hidden_size"]
200	        return vcfg
201	    return config
202	
203	
204	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
205	# Shared dynamo export helper
206	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
207	
208	
209	def _run_dynamo_export(
210	    model: nn.Module,
211	    dynamo_inputs: tuple | dict[str, torch.Tensor],
212	    output_path: str,
213	    onnx_input_names: list[str],
214	    output_names: list[str],
215	    dynamic_shapes: dict,
216	) -> None:
217	    model.eval()
218	    translation_table = build_custom_translation_table()
219	
220	    assert len(dynamo_inputs) == len(onnx_input_names) and \
221	        len(dynamo_inputs) == len(dynamic_shapes), \
222	        f"dynamo_inputs: {len(dynamo_inputs)}, onnx_input_names: {len(onnx_input_names)}, dynamic_shapes: {len(dynamic_shapes)}"
223	
224	    if isinstance(dynamo_inputs, dict):
225	        args = ()
226	        kwargs = dynamo_inputs
227	    else:
228	        assert isinstance(dynamo_inputs, tuple)
229	        args = dynamo_inputs
230	        kwargs = {}
231	
232	    logger.info("Exporting ONNX to %s (opset %d) ...", output_path,
233	                _OPSET_VERSION)
234	    with _permissive_inline_opset():
235	        prog = torch.onnx.export(
236	            model,
237	            args,
238	            kwargs=kwargs,
239	            dynamo=True,
240	            input_names=onnx_input_names,
241	            output_names=output_names,
242	            dynamic_shapes=dynamic_shapes,
243	            opset_version=_OPSET_VERSION,
244	            custom_translation_table=translation_table,
245	            external_data=True,
246	            optimize=True,
247	        )
248	    prog.save(output_path, external_data=True)
249	    with open(output_path, "rb") as _f:
250	        os.fsync(_f.fileno())
251	    logger.info("Export complete: %s", output_path)
252	
253	
254	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
255	# Visual encoder export
256	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
257	
258	
259	def export_visual_onnx(
260	    model_dir: str,
261	    output_path: str,
262	    weights: dict,
263	    config: dict,
264	    model_type: str,
265	    model_config: "ModelConfig",
266	    dtype: torch.dtype = torch.float16,
267	) -> None:
268	    """Export a from-scratch visual encoder to ONNX.
269	
270	    Args:
271	        model_dir:    Source checkpoint directory (for reference; weights
272	                      already loaded by the caller).
273	        output_path:  Destination ``.onnx`` file path.
274	        weights:      Flat ``{key: tensor}`` dict loaded from safetensors.
275	        config:       Full model ``config.json`` dict.
276	        model_type:   Value of ``config.json["model_type"]``.
277	        model_config: Top-level ``ModelConfig``.  All family ``build_fn``s
278	                      accept it and dispatch their linear layers through
279	                      ``make_linear``; an FP16 checkpoint produces
280	                      ``FP16Linear`` everywhere.
281	        dtype:        Weight dtype (default ``float16``).
282	    """
283	    device = "cpu"
284	    if model_type not in _VISUAL_REGISTRY:
285	        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported visual model_type {model_type!r}. "
286	                         f"Supported: {sorted(_VISUAL_REGISTRY)}")
287	    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(output_path)), exist_ok=True)
288	
289	    family = _VISUAL_REGISTRY[model_type]
290	    vcfg = _get_visual_config(model_type, config)
291	
292	    # Build the from-scratch model using a package-relative import so source
293	    # checkouts and installed wheels resolve the same implementation.
294	    _PKG_ROOT = "tensorrt_edgellm"
295	    _rel = "." + _VISUAL_FAMILY_MODULE[family][len(_PKG_ROOT):]
296	    mod = importlib.import_module(_rel, package=__package__)
297	    build_fn = getattr(mod, _VISUAL_FAMILY_BUILD_FN[family])
298	    logger.info("Building %s visual model ...", family)
299	    visual_model: nn.Module = build_fn(vcfg,
300	                                       weights,
301	                                       model_config=model_config,
302	                                       dtype=dtype)
303	    visual_model = visual_model.to(device)
304	    visual_model.eval()
305	
306	    # I/O spec is provided by the model class
307	    dynamo_inputs, onnx_input_names, output_names, dynamic_shapes = (
308	        visual_model.get_onnx_export_args(vcfg, device))
309	
310	    _run_dynamo_export(visual_model, dynamo_inputs, output_path,
311	                       onnx_input_names, output_names, dynamic_shapes)
312	
313	    # TRT-compat post-processing for quantized weights — same passes the LLM
314	    # path runs in ``export.py``.  Without these, NVFP4 weights stay as INT8
315	    # initializers and TRT's DequantizeLinear can't expand the packed dim.
316	    if model_config is not None:
317	        nvfp4 = model_config.quant.uses_nvfp4_weights
318	        mxfp8 = model_config.quant.uses_mxfp8_weights
319	        if nvfp4:
320	            _fix_nvfp4_weight_dtype(output_path)
321	        if mxfp8:
322	            _strip_onnxscript_internal_attrs(output_path)
323	        if nvfp4 or mxfp8:
324	            # Visual graphs legitimately keep FP32 constants from in-body
325	            # ``.float()`` casts (RMSNorm computes in FP32); skip the FP32→FP16
326	            # downgrade that the LLM path uses for tied-lm_head BF16 fixup.
327	            _fix_initializer_dtypes(output_path,
328	                                    dedup_dql_scales=True,
329	                                    cast_fp32_weights_to_fp16=False)
330	
331	    # Phi-4mm sidecar tensors (GN projection weights)
332	    if family == "phi4mm":
333	        sidecar_path = visual_model.save_onnx_sidecar(
334	            os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(output_path)))
335	        logger.info("Saved Phi-4mm GN projection sidecar: %s", sidecar_path)
336	
337	
338	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
339	# Audio encoder export
340	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
341	
342	
343	def export_audio_onnx(
344	    model_dir: str,
345	    output_path: str,
346	    weights: dict,
347	    config: dict,
348	    model_type: str,
349	    model_config: "ModelConfig | None" = None,
350	    dtype: torch.dtype = torch.float16,
351	) -> None:
352	    """Export a from-scratch audio encoder to ONNX.
353	
354	    Args:
355	        model_dir:   Source checkpoint directory (for reference).
356	        output_path: Destination ``.onnx`` file path.
357	        weights:     Flat ``{key: tensor}`` dict from safetensors.
358	        config:      Full ``config.json`` dict.
359	        model_type:  Value of ``config.json["model_type"]``.
360	        model_config: Top-level :class:`ModelConfig` for ``make_linear``
361	            dispatch in :class:`QwenAudioEncoder` Linears (``None`` =
362	            FP16-only).
363	        dtype:       Weight dtype (default ``float16``).
364	    """
365	    device = "cpu"
366	    if model_type not in _AUDIO_MODEL_TYPES:
367	        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported audio model_type {model_type!r}. "
368	                         f"Supported: {sorted(_AUDIO_MODEL_TYPES)}")
369	    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(output_path)), exist_ok=True)
370	
371	    # Gemma4 Unified is encoder-free: it builds its own module and export
372	    # arguments, so it bypasses the build_fn registry below entirely.
373	    if model_type == "gemma4_unified":
374	        from ..models.gemma4.modeling_gemma4_unified_audio import \
375	            build_gemma4_unified_audio
376	        if model_config is None:
377	            from ..config import ModelConfig
378	            model_config = ModelConfig.from_pretrained(model_dir)
379	        logger.info("Building Gemma4 Unified encoder-free audio model ...")
380	        audio_model = build_gemma4_unified_audio(config,
381	                                                 weights,
382	                                                 model_config=model_config,
383	                                                 dtype=dtype)
384	        audio_model = audio_model.to(device).eval()
385	        args, input_names, output_names, dynamic_shapes = (
386	            audio_model.get_onnx_export_args(config, device))
387	        _run_dynamo_export(audio_model, args, output_path, input_names,
388	                           output_names, dynamic_shapes)
389	        return
390	
391	    build_fn = None
392	    extra_kwargs = {}
393	    if model_type in _NEMOTRON_OMNI_MODEL_TYPES:
394	        from ..models.nemotron_omni.modeling_nemotron_omni_audio import \
395	            build_nemotron_omni_audio
396	        logger.info("Building Nemotron-Omni audio encoder ...")
397	        build_fn = build_nemotron_omni_audio
398	    elif model_type == "gemma4":
399	        from ..models.gemma4.modeling_gemma4_audio import build_gemma4_audio
400	        if model_config is None:
401	            from ..model import load_model_config
402	            model_config = load_model_config(model_dir)
403	        key_prefix = _AUDIO_KEY_PREFIX.get(model_type)
404	        logger.info("Building Gemma4 audio encoder (prefix=%r) ...",
405	                    key_prefix)
406	        build_fn = build_gemma4_audio
407	        extra_kwargs = {
408	            "prefix": key_prefix,
409	            "model_config": model_config,
410	        }
411	    else:
412	        from ..models.qwen3_asr.modeling_qwen3_asr_audio import \
413	            build_qwen_audio
414	        config = config.get("thinker_config",
415	                            {}).get("audio_config",
416	                                    config.get("audio_config", config))
417	        key_prefix = _AUDIO_KEY_PREFIX.get(model_type)
418	        logger.info("Building %s audio encoder (prefix=%r) ...", model_type,
419	                    key_prefix)
420	        build_fn = build_qwen_audio
421	        extra_kwargs = {
422	            "prefix": key_prefix,
423	            "model_config": model_config,
424	        }
425	
426	    audio_model = build_fn(config, weights, dtype, **extra_kwargs)
427	    audio_model = audio_model.to(device).eval()
428	    args, input_names, output_names, dynamic_shapes = (
429	        audio_model.get_onnx_export_args(config, device))
430	
431	    _run_dynamo_export(audio_model, args, output_path, input_names,
432	                       output_names, dynamic_shapes)
433	
434	
435	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
436	# Action expert export (Alpamayo)
437	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
438	
439	
440	def export_action_onnx(
441	    output_path: str,
442	    weights: dict,
443	    config: "ActionConfig",
444	    max_kv_cache_capacity: int,
445	    dtype: torch.dtype = torch.float16,
446	) -> None:
447	    """Export Alpamayo action expert (one flow-matching step) to ONNX.
448	
449	    Args:
450	        output_path: Destination ``.onnx`` file path.
451	        weights:     Flat ``{key: tensor}`` dict from safetensors (must include
452	                     ``expert.*``, ``action_in_proj.*``, ``action_out_proj.*``).
453	        config:      :class:`~config.ActionConfig` with expert hyperparameters.
454	        max_kv_cache_capacity: Fixed KV cache capacity (must match LLM engine).
455	        dtype:       Weight dtype (default ``float16``).
456	    """
457	    device = "cpu"
458	    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(output_path)), exist_ok=True)
459	
460	    from ..models.alpamayo.modeling_alpamayo_action import \
461	        build_alpamayo_1_action
462	    logger.info("Building Alpamayo action expert ...")
463	    model = build_alpamayo_1_action(config, weights, dtype)
464	    model = model.to(device)
465	    model.eval()
466	
467	    dynamo_inputs, onnx_input_names, output_names, dynamic_shapes = (
468	        model.get_onnx_export_args(max_kv_cache_capacity, device))
469	
470	    _run_dynamo_export(model, dynamo_inputs, output_path, onnx_input_names,
471	                       output_names, dynamic_shapes)
472	
473	
474	def write_action_config(config: "ActionConfig", max_kv_cache_capacity: int,
475	                        out_dir: str) -> None:
476	    """Write the action config.json for the C++ runtime."""
477	    import json
478	    os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True)
479	    rope_scaling = {
480	        "mrope_section": config.mrope_section,
481	        "mrope_interleaved": config.mrope_interleaved,
482	        "rope_type": "mrope",
483	        "type": "mrope",
484	    }
485	    cfg_out = {
486	        "rope_theta": config.rope_theta,
487	        "rope_scaling": rope_scaling,
488	        "num_hidden_layers": config.num_hidden_layers,
489	        "num_attention_heads": config.num_attention_heads,
490	        "num_key_value_heads": config.num_key_value_heads,
491	        "head_dim": config.head_dim,
492	        "hidden_size": config.hidden_size,
493	        "intermediate_size": config.intermediate_size,
494	        "rms_norm_eps": config.rms_norm_eps,
495	        "num_traj_tokens": config.num_traj_tokens,
496	        "traj_token_start": config.traj_token_start,
497	        "n_diffusion_tokens": config.n_diffusion_tokens,
498	        "builder_config": {
499	            "max_kv_cache_capacity": max_kv_cache_capacity,
500	        },
501	    }
502	    path = os.path.join(out_dir, "config.json")
503	    with open(path, "w") as f:
504	        json.dump(cfg_out, f, indent=2)
505	    logger.info("Wrote action config.json: %s", path)
506
